svg.text: Foundation security patterns for Supabase data isolation

g.text: RLS Query Flow: How auth.uid() = user_id Works
User A cannot see Bob or Charlie's data - isolation works!
As a user, I need assurance that my personal data is isolated from other users,
so that no one can view, modify, or delete my information without my explicit consent.
Test: Two test users verify User A cannot see User B's data
As a user, I need to be the only person who can modify my profile,
so that my account information stays under my control at all times.
Test: Profile updates succeed as owner, fail as another user
As a backend service, I need to perform cross-user operations (notifications, webhooks),
so that the application functions properly for system-level tasks.
Test: Service operations succeed with service credentials where user credentials fail
As a compliance officer, I need audit logs to be immutable,
so that security events cannot be tampered with after the fact.
Test: All modification/deletion attempts on audit_logs fail
As a security admin, I need anonymous users to have minimal access,
so that unauthenticated visitors cannot access or enumerate user data.
Test: All protected data inaccessible without authentication

a.text: All core tables have RLS enabled before production
Zero successful cross-user data access in security testing
Zero audit log tampering in testing
